chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Pett. No.D-571 of 2022 DATE OF HEARING ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE Hearing of case 1. For orders on office objections at flag ‘A’ 2. For hearing of main case 02.09.2025 Mr. Tanveer Abbas Shah, Advocate for respondents/SEPCO Mr. Nisar Ahmed Abro, Deputy Attorney General ************** None present for the petitioner, nor any intimation received. However, learned counsel for the respondents/SEPCO files a statement and submits that the grievance of the petitioner has been redressed. Since none present for the petitioner since long to pursue the matter and on the other hand grievance of the petitioner has already been redressed, therefore present Constitution Petition stands dismissed for non-prosecution. J U D G E J U D G E M. Ali*
